title: About Us | Purbachal Apparel Limited
meta_desc: Learn about Purbachal Apparel Limited: our history, board of directors, mission, and commitment to quality and sustainability since 2012.
hero_desc: A leading woven garment manufacturer and 100% exporter from Bangladesh, committed to quality, compliance, and sustainable practices since 2012.

overview_table_rows.label: Types of Garments
overview_table_rows.value: Woven Tops, Lightweight Bottoms, Nightwear, Kidswear

overview_right_body:
Purbachal Apparel Limited (PAL) was founded in 2012 with a clear vision: to become a world-class woven garment manufacturer from Bangladesh. Since commencing production operations in 2017, we have grown into a respected 100% export-oriented manufacturer, serving some of Europe's most recognised fashion and retail brands.

Our state-of-the-art facility in Gazipur is equipped with more than 20 modern production lines and staffed by a dedicated workforce of over 2,000 skilled employees, of whom more than 60% are women. We are deeply committed to ethical manufacturing, environmental sustainability, and the well-being of our workers and the communities in which we operate.

With an annual turnover of USD 32 million and 12 international certifications, including OEKO-TEX Standard 100, GOTS, SEDEX, and WRAP; PAL stands as a benchmark of quality, compliance, and reliability in the global garment supply chain.
directors_desc: Our leadership team brings decades of combined experience in garment manufacturing, export management, and sustainable business practices.

directors_items.name: Md. Masud Hossain
directors_items.quote: Purbachal Apparel was built on a foundation of trust, quality, and ethical manufacturing. Every garment we produce is a reflection of our commitment to our clients and our community. We do not just manufacture apparel; we build lasting partnerships.

directors_items.name: Md. Naimul Alam
directors_items.quote: Our vision has always been to create a world-class apparel enterprise from Bangladesh. We invest not only in machinery and processes but in our people, ensuring every worker is treated with dignity, fairly compensated, and supported in their growth.

mission_items.title: Our Mission
mission_items.text: To contribute to the nation's prosperity by ensuring employment, healthcare facilities, and reducing greenhouse emissions, while delivering world-class woven garments to our global clients with utmost diligence.

mission_items.title: Our Vision
mission_items.text: To create a team of motivated employees who share our purpose: to support our nation's economy and provide consistently high-quality goods to our valued clients worldwide.

mission_items.title: Our Business Motive
mission_items.text: We believe in Quality. Our core business motive is to achieve 100% customer satisfaction by producing qualitative products that meet and exceed international standards and client expectations.

welfare_desc: Beyond production, we focus on our people and the planet, embedding social responsibility and environmental stewardship into every aspect of our operations.

culture_items.title: Our Journey
culture_items.text: From a focused start in 2017 to a globally recognized manufacturer, our journey is defined by perseverance, investment in quality, and continuous improvement.

culture_items.title: Our People
culture_items.text: Our 2,000+ workforce is the heart of PAL. We invest in skills training, fair wages, healthcare support, and a safe working environment for every employee.

culture_items.title: Our Values
culture_items.text: Integrity, transparency, quality, and sustainability are not just words at PAL; they guide every decision we make, from the factory floor to the boardroom.

culture_items.title: Our Future
culture_items.text: We are committed to expanding our capacity, deepening our sustainability initiatives, and growing our global client base while maintaining the quality and ethics that define us.
